title: MAX and MIN
hints: Use contribution technique: sum of (max - min) for all subarrays = sum of max for all subarrays - sum of min for all subarrays.
For each element, find how many subarrays it contributes as maximum and minimum.
Use stacks to find nearest smaller element (nsl, nsr) and nearest greater element (ngl, ngr).
For element A[i], number of subarrays where it's maximum = (ngr[i] - i) * (i - ngl[i]).
For element A[i], number of subarrays where it's minimum = (nsr[i] - i) * (i - nsl[i]).
Sum all contributions and return modulo 10^9+7.
